user.title: Voice Identity
user.description: Set up Voice Identity and choose the runtime defaults for services, storage, generation, diagnostics, and attribution.

data_description.service_enabled: Controls whether the Voice Identity runtime is active for this entry.
data_description.service_startup_timeout_seconds: How long Home Assistant should wait for Voice Identity to start before timing out.
data_description.service_max_cached_voiceprints: Maximum number of voiceprints to keep cached in memory.
data_description.storage_provider: Storage backend used to persist voiceprint artifacts and related data.
data_description.storage_base_path: Folder name or path segment used for Voice Identity storage under Home Assistant's config directory.
data_description.storage_encryption_required: Requires encrypted storage for persisted artifacts when supported by the backend.
data_description.generation_model_preference: Primary model to prefer when generating or matching voiceprints.
data_description.generation_min_sample_count: Minimum number of samples required before generation can proceed.
data_description.generation_max_sample_count: Maximum number of samples accepted for a single generation run.
data_description.generation_quality_threshold: Minimum quality score a sample must meet to be accepted.
data_description.generation_supported_models: Comma-separated list of model names this integration may use.
data_description.cleanup_enabled: Controls whether background cleanup tasks are enabled.
data_description.cleanup_session_timeout_seconds: How long an idle session can remain open before cleanup considers it stale.
data_description.cleanup_reconcile_on_startup: Runs reconciliation checks when Voice Identity starts.
data_description.diagnostics_enabled: Enables diagnostics data collection and reporting.
data_description.diagnostics_allowlist_only: Restricts diagnostics to approved fields only.
data_description.diagnostics_include_runtime_metrics: Includes live runtime metrics in diagnostic output.
data_description.feature_flags_enable_repairs: Enables repair recommendations and related services.
data_description.feature_flags_enable_experimental_models: Allows experimental models to be considered by the integration.
data_description.attribution_default_confidence_threshold: Baseline confidence score required before attribution is accepted.
data_description.attribution_max_candidate_scope_size: Maximum number of candidate matches evaluated during attribution.
data_description.attribution_require_attribution_for_iden: Requires attribution before identity context data can be returned.

error.invalid_options: The selected settings are not valid.
